author: niek0105
content: I just want to hear some feedback about this worth being continuing, so from what I have measured is that I'm getting 2 ZK verifications a second on the CORTEX m33

author: niek0105
content: I might be looking over something please don't be afraid to be critical.

author: niek0105
content:
